title: Censoring-aware metric library (Harrell + Uno C-index, time-dependent AUC, integrated Brier score)
context: Survival analysis requires censoring-aware metrics that correctly handle right-censored outcomes. Plain AUC applied to a censored binary outcome, or concordance computed without censoring weights, produces inflated and misleading estimates. This task implements the four required censoring-aware metrics from the methodology spec (task 001): Harrell C-index, Uno C-index, time-dependent AUC, and integrated Brier score. Each must be unit-tested against known reference values (e.g. from published papers or reference implementations in lifelines/scikit-survival). Naive uncensored metrics must be rejected by the audit when applied to survival data.
objective: Implement and unit-test the censoring-aware metric library required by the methodology spec: Harrell C-index, Uno C-index, time-dependent AUC, and integrated Brier score with correct handling of right-censored outcomes; unit-test each metric against known reference values from a published reference implementation or paper; add an audit check that rejects naive (uncensored) AUC or accuracy when applied to survival-labelled data and fails CI on violation.
acceptanceCriteria: Implements Harrell C-index and Uno C-index with correct handling of right-censoring (censored observations contribute correctly to the concordance calculation per their respective formulations)
Implements time-dependent AUC for survival data (e.g. cumulative/dynamic AUC at specified time points) with correct censoring handling
Implements integrated Brier score for right-censored survival data with IPCW (inverse probability of censoring weighting) correction

Each metric is unit-tested against known reference values derived from a published reference implementation (e.g. lifelines, scikit-survival, or R survival package) or a published benchmark paper; the tests are committed and run in CI

An audit check is added that detects naive (uncensored) AUC or accuracy being applied to survival-labelled (censored) data and fails CI on violation; a golden leaky fixture demonstrates the check works
Technical reviewer and domain reviewer confirm the metric implementations are statistically correct
output: A merged PR delivering the censoring-aware metric library (Harrell+Uno C-index, time-dependent AUC, integrated Brier score) with unit tests against reference values and an audit check that rejects naive metrics on censored survival data.
